steps.command:

FROM bookings.flights

LIMIT 10;

SELECT *
FROM bookings.flights
ORDER BY flight_id ASC
LIMIT 10;

FROM bookings.flights
GROUP BY flight_no, scheduled_departure
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;
